attachments.fallback: Amplify - Podcast App Built Using Fuse - @Hassan_M
attachments.text:
Hi <https://forums.fusetools.com/u/lakexyde|@lakexyde>, Congratulations for the release of the App, I’ve tried the app and it’s so slick with very nice UI Layouts. The player podcast screen is what I like the most of the UI, with clean look and the BarWave component that act as the sound’s wavelength and also as a progress of playing, It’s brilliant!

Me, as one of the maintainer Fuse Open Framework is very happy and proud for you. And I …
attachments.title: Amplify - Podcast App Built Using Fuse [Show and Tell]
